description: 5-minute strategy set — adapted from proven 15m UTC hour patterns. Entry minutes scaled to 5m cycle (0-4). Same price bands, same directional edge.

conditions.description: 5m markets: wider price acceptance (45-80c) since 5m prices cluster near 50c more often

stats.basis: Same UTC hours proven profitable on 15m (93%+ WR). 5m markets at same hours share the same crypto momentum dynamics. Entry minutes scaled to 5m cycle (max 4). Price bands widened to include 45-80c since 5m prices are often near 50c.
